tests.test_name: Cypress - PO - single test, core output structure
tests.description: Verifies that a Product Owner can upload a single Cypress test file and receive a properly structured JSON documentation output.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation is generated and displayed
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output panel shows results after submitting a single Cypress test file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the downloaded JSON are filled in with real content, not placeholders

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON framework is identified as cypress
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output correctly labels the test framework as Cypress

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON has 1 or more tests
test_coverage.what_it_checks: At least one test entry is present in the output

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each documented test is given a meaningful name

tests.test_name: Cypress - PO - forEach data-driven expands one test per row
tests.description: Verifies that when a Product Owner uploads a data-driven Cypress test using forEach, each data row is expanded into its own separate test entry in the output.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation is generated and displayed
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output panel shows results after submitting a forEach data-driven Cypress test file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the downloaded JSON are filled in with real content, not placeholders

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON framework is identified as cypress
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output correctly labels the test framework as Cypress

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON has 3 or more tests
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The forEach loop is expanded so that each data row produces its own distinct test entry

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each expanded test entry is given a meaningful name

tests.test_name: Cypress - PO - for...of expands one test per row
tests.description: Verifies that when a Product Owner uploads a data-driven Cypress test using for...of, each data row is expanded into its own separate test entry in the output.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation is generated and displayed
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output panel shows results after submitting a for...of data-driven Cypress test file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the downloaded JSON are filled in with real content, not placeholders

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON framework is identified as cypress
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output correctly labels the test framework as Cypress

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON has 3 or more tests
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The for...of loop is expanded so that each data row produces its own distinct test entry

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each expanded test entry is given a meaningful name

tests.test_name: Cypress - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
tests.description: Verifies that a QA Manager receives a documentation output that includes a populated test coverage matrix when uploading a single Cypress test file.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation is generated and displayed
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output panel shows results after submitting a single Cypress test file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the downloaded JSON are filled in with real content, not placeholders

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON framework is identified as cypress
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output correctly labels the test framework as Cypress

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON has 1 or more tests
test_coverage.what_it_checks: At least one test entry is present in the output

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each documented test is given a meaningful name

test_coverage.verification_step: First test has a non-empty test_coverage_matrix array
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The QA Manager view includes a coverage matrix with at least one entry for the test

tests.description: Verifies that when a QA Manager uploads a data-driven Cypress test using forEach, all data rows are collapsed into a single test entry with a coverage matrix row for each example.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation is generated and displayed
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output panel shows results after submitting a forEach data-driven Cypress test file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the downloaded JSON are filled in with real content, not placeholders

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON framework is identified as cypress
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output correctly labels the test framework as Cypress

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON has exactly 1 test
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The forEach data-driven test is collapsed into a single test entry rather than expanded

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The collapsed test entry is given a meaningful name

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix row count matches the examples
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The number of rows in the coverage matrix equals the number of data rows in the forEach loop

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix rows use the correct schema for cypress
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each coverage matrix row follows the expected structure for Cypress test documentation
